cast.name: 迈尔斯·安德森 Myles Anderson

writer.name: 迈尔斯·安德森 Myles Anderson

introduction: Myles Anderson's new comedy special is a unique exploration of living in the middle of the forest on Vancouver Island. Anderson delves into absurd situations like inheriting guns, preparing for break-ins with Bond-villain monologues, having a resting rich face, and living with elderly relatives. Through self-deprecating charm, Myles offers a comedic glimpse into the joys and pitfalls of island life and off-island life.
